_comment: Workflow ElementId (GUID) -> readable Step name, resolved from live data joined to the D365 export (consensus over multiple sample PRs, 2026-06-26). Each published workflow version has its own element GUIDs, so several GUIDs map to one step name. Department-manager/director steps share elements, so a row may occasionally show a sibling department's label, but all manager labels roll up to the 'Dep Managers' bucket and all director labels to 'Director' in the dashboard, so bucketing stays correct. ~17 older-version GUIDs (stale InReview PRs that the export also leaves blank) remain unmapped by design.
